title: Eres III

{{Quote|You were at Serroco, when they turned the Stereb cities into glass craters. At Duro, when basilisk war droids rained like meteors onto the orbiting cities, and when the Mandalorians set fire to the Xoxin plains on Eres III—the fires that still burn.|Atton Rand, to the Jedi Exile|<ref name="KOTOR2" />}}
'''Eres III''' was a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] located in the [[Esuain sector/Legends|Esuain sector]]. During the [[Mandalorian Wars]], the [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders]] [[Battle of Eres III|attacked]] it, causing [[Standard decade/Legends|decade]]-long [[Fire/Legends|fires]] on the world's surface when they ignited its [[Xoxin plains]] region. Eres III was a part of the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Revan/Legends|Darth Revan's]] [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|empire]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]], and [[Millennium/Legends|millennia]] later, the world's fate was mentioned in the [[Industry, Honor, Savagery: Shaping the Mandalorian Soul|keynote address]] at [[Brentaal Academy]]'s [[Proceedings of Galactic Anthropology and History|412th Proceedings of Galactic Anthropology and History]].

==Description==
Eres III,<ref name="KOTOR2" /> also known simply as Eres,<ref name="EGTW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref> was a terrestrial<ref name="KOTOR2" /> border [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="EGTW" /> located in the [[Eres system/Legends|Eres system]], a part of the [[Esuain sector/Legends|Esuain sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Trans-Hydian]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="EAOC" /> Its surface included the area known as the [[Xoxin plains]].<ref name="KOTOR2" />

==History==
{{Quote|Neo-Crusaders broke through the Republic lines and invaded Taris; skirted the Republic border to attack Ithor, Ord Mantell, and the Zabrak worlds around Iridonia; and blasted the border world of Eres III.|Vilnau Teupt, 412th Proceedings of Galactic Anthropology and History|<ref name="EGTW" />}}
A [[Battle of Eres III|battle]] of the [[Mandalorian Wars]] was fought in the Eres [[Star system/Legends|system]]<ref name="KOTOR2" /> in [[3962 BBY]]<ref name="TEA" /> between the [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders]] and the [[Republic Military/Legends|military forces]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], the latter of which included the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] known as the [[Meetra Surik|Jedi Exile]].<ref name="KOTOR2" /> The [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] blasted Eres III<ref name="TEA" /> and set the Xoxin plains [[Fire/Legends|ablaze]], with the fires continuing until at least<ref name="KOTOR2" /> [[3951 BBY]].<ref name="3951 BBY">''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' dates the events of ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' to [[3951 BBY]].</ref> The attackers subsequently left the world cowed<ref name="TEA" /> and ruined.<ref name="EGTW" /> During the [[Jedi Civil War]] of [[3959 BBY]]–[[3956 BBY]], Eres III fell within the territory controlled by the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|empire]] founded by the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Revan/Legends|Darth Revan]].<ref name="TEA" />

{{GameLSmechanics|Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords}}
In 3951 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]],<ref name="3951 BBY" /> in a conversation about the Mandalorian Wars with [[Atton Rand]], a former member of the Republic military, he reminded the Jedi Exile about the fate of Eres III.<ref name="KOTOR2" />
{{Endgame}}

[[Vilnau Teupt]] also mentioned the attack on Eres III in the keynote address "[[Industry, Honor, Savagery: Shaping the Mandalorian Soul]]" at [[Brentaal Academy]]'s [[Proceedings of Galactic Anthropology and History|412th Proceedings of Galactic Anthropology and History]] in [[24 ABY/Legends|24 ABY]]. Teupt, however, erroneously placed the event in [[3963 BBY]].<ref name="EGTW" />

==Behind the scenes==
Eres III was introduced in the [[2004]] [[Obsidian Entertainment]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''. In the game, the celestial body can be mentioned in an optional conversation the player character, the Jedi Exile, can have with the character Atton Rand. This article assumes one hundred percent game completion and that the conversation took place as described.<ref name="KOTOR2" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', which mentioned the Eres system and introduced the shortened name "Eres," placed Eres III in grid square Q-7,<ref name="TEA" /> and the [[2012]] reference book ''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' by [[Jason Fry]] and [[Paul R. Urquhart]] confirmed that the shortened name also applied to the world.<ref name="EGTW" />
